Evening Primrose (Oenothera species) is a flowering plant in the family Onagraceae, native to North America. The health benefits of Evening Primrose include reducing inflammation and pain, improving skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The bioactive constituents of Evening Primrose include gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Evening Primrose include oil capsules and tinctures, which are often used to support skin health and alleviate menstrual cramps.
